# balena_device_tag (Resource)

Manages a tag on a Balena device.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "balena_device_tag" "role" {
  device_uuid = "a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4"
  tag_key     = "role"
  value       = "gateway"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `device_id` (Number) ID of the device.
- `tag_key` (String) Tag key.
- `value` (String) Tag value.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier.
